---
name: Feature Request / New Article
about: Suggest a new guide, article topic, or improvement to existing content
title: "[REQUEST] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Request Type

<!-- Check the appropriate option -->
- [ ] New article or guide
- [ ] Expansion of an existing article
- [ ] New code example or sample project
- [ ] New starter template
- [ ] Site feature (navigation, search, etc.)
- [ ] Other improvement

## Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement you'd like to see -->


## Proposed Title

<!-- If requesting a new article/guide, what should the title be? -->


## Target Audience

<!-- Who is this content for? (e.g., beginners, intermediate, advanced developers) -->
- [ ] Beginners (first extension)
- [ ] Intermediate (published 1-2 extensions)
- [ ] Advanced (production extensions with significant user base)

## Estimated Scope

<!-- Approximate length and depth of the requested content -->
- [ ] Short reference (under 1000 words)
- [ ] Standard guide (1500-3000 words)
- [ ] Deep dive (3000+ words)
- [ ] Multi-part series

## Key Topics to Cover

<!-- What specific topics, APIs, or patterns should be covered? Use a bulleted list. -->
-
-

<!-- If expanding/improving an existing article, provide the link -->
- **Article URL**:
- **File path** (if known):

<!-- Describe what specific improvements you'd like to see for the existing article -->


## Why It Matters

<!-- Explain why this would be useful for Chrome extension developers.
     Include links to Stack Overflow questions, forum threads, or blog posts
     that show demand for this topic. -->


## Related Resources

<!-- Links to official docs, blog posts, or examples that could inform the content -->
-

## Willingness to Contribute

<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] I would like to write this content myself (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I can provide code examples but need help with the prose
- [ ] I cannot write this but want the content to exist
- [ ] I can help review a draft
